name: Catalyst Metals Limited
analysis: CYL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.4600, stop A$4.4352, target A$7.6500 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
